runners.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early split and went straight to the front, scoring an all the way win (29.86) over 515m at this track. Expected to measure up again.

formComments.title: TAB

runners.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 4th over 435m at Sale beaten 4 lengths (25.02) behind Valencia Jim in a Grade 5 on April 8. Placed two back at Warragul. Has been around the mark at her last couple and should make her presence felt.

runners.formComment: Good effort last time when second (24.93) over 435m at Sale. Drawn close to the inside. Prefer others.

runners.formComment: Goes well at this track and trip. At the last outing finished 4th over 460m at Warragul beaten 4 lengths (26.72) behind Big Duke in a Grade 5 on April 9. Has claims if at her best.

runners.formComment: Last start finished fourth in a Grade 5 NP on April 6 over 515m at this track behind Galloping Red, beaten 4.5 lengths (30.17). Top-three hope with the right run.

runners.formComment: Last start finished sixth in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 8 over 510m at Sale behind Lose My Mind, beaten 9 lengths (29.26). Happy enough to avoid.

runners.formComment: Solid performance to post a big 5 lengths win at Geelong over 400m (22.72) beating Squeegee's Ride in Grade 5 H on April 7. Solid win last time out but this looks tough.
